name: recall
title: Recall
description: Private local search across your files, email, calendar, and notes
author: aayu22809

preferences.name: pythonPackagePath
preferences.title: Python Package Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the Recall Python package (the directory containing vector_embedded_finder/)

preferences.name: pythonPath
preferences.title: Python Binary
preferences.description: Path to the python3 binary (leave blank for default)

preferences.name: geminiApiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Your Gemini API key (stored in macOS Keychain). Required when not using the setup wizard.

commands.name: search-memory
commands.title: Memory Search
commands.subtitle: Recall
commands.description: Search images, audio, PDFs and text with natural language

commands.name: email-search
commands.title: Email Search
commands.subtitle: Recall
commands.description: Search Gmail threads in your local index

commands.name: calendar-today
commands.title: Upcoming Events
commands.subtitle: Recall
commands.description: Show upcoming events from connected calendars

commands.name: manage
commands.title: Manage Recall
commands.subtitle: Recall
commands.description: Connectors, sync progress, folder indexing, and API key setup

commands.name: sync-status
commands.title: Sync Status
commands.subtitle: Recall
commands.description: View connector auth/sync status and trigger sync

commands.name: open-memory
commands.title: Memory Open
commands.subtitle: Recall
commands.description: Search and open the best matching file
